mapper.select: select role_code from yu_role a where EXISTS(SELECT role_id from yu_user_role b where a.role_id=b.role_id and b.user_id=#{id})
SELECT * from yu_permission a where EXISTS(select permission_id from yu_permission b where a.permission_id=b.permission_id and b.data_rule_code=#{code}) and status=1

select data_rule_ids from yu_user as a join yu_user_role as b on a.user_id=b.user_id join yu_role as r on r.role_id=b.role_id join yu_role as pr on pr.role_code = r.params_role_code join yu_role_permission p ON pr.role_id = p.role_id AND p.data_rule_ids IS NOT NULL where a.user_id = #{id} group by p.data_rule_ids
SELECT a.*,b.perms FROM yu_permission_data_rule a INNER JOIN yu_permission b ON a.permission_id=b.permission_id WHERE a.status=1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cc_operation ( operation_id, log_type, log_content, operate_type, user_id, username, ip, method, request_url, request_param, request_type, cost_time, create_time, create_name ) VALUES
( #{operation.operationId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{operation.logType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{operation.logContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.operateType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{operation.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.method,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.requestUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.requestParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.requestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation.costTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operation.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operation.createName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select *,date_add(now(),interval -5 second) as now_date from cc_common_task where task_id=#{id}
mapper.update: update cc_pk set increasing_val=#{increasingVal} where pk_type=#{pkType}
mapper.select: select increasing_val from cc_pk where pk_type = #{pkType}
